sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Top charcoal at cols 10-63 (54px). Try moving it right to align with green strip (cols 28-29).
# Click blue above black bar (rows 16-19) to move top charcoal RIGHT.
print("Moving top charcoal right with (18, 2)...")
for i in range(20):
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 18, 'col': 2}])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] > 20:
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            print(f"  Click {i+1}: top charcoal cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, {n['pixels']}px")
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
        print("  LEVEL COMPLETED!")
        break
    if last_action_result.get('game_over'):
        print("  GAME OVER!")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
